title: Additional Tool Post-Install Hooks
description: Extend default post-install hooks to more tools that commonly need post-installation configuration
acceptance_criteria: Tools with common post-install needs have default hooks
Hooks follow idempotent pattern (check before modify)
All hooks work in CI environments

existing_hooks: kubectl - shell completion and k alias
new_hooks_added: python - pip upgrade + user site PATH

tasks.title: Add node default hook
tasks.description: Configure npm global prefix and add to PATH

tasks.title: Add python default hook
tasks.description: Upgrade pip and configure user site-packages PATH

tasks.title: Add rust default hook
tasks.description: Install common rustup components and configure cargo PATH
tasks.notes: Rust uses a custom installer (not define_tool! macro), so default hooks are not supported. Requires infrastructure enhancement to add hook support for custom installers.

tasks.title: Add awscli default hook
tasks.description: Configure AWS CLI defaults and shell completion

tasks.title: Add gh (GitHub CLI) default hook
tasks.description: Configure shell completion for GitHub CLI

tasks.title: Add docker default hook
tasks.description: Add user to docker group on Linux

tasks.title: Add bat default hook
tasks.description: Set bat as MANPAGER for colored man pages

implementation_notes.pattern: All hooks follow idempotent pattern: check with grep before appending
implementation_notes.ci_compatible: Hooks must work in CI environments (non-interactive)
implementation_notes.advisory: Hook failures should be warnings, not errors
implementation_notes.precedence: User-defined hooks in [hooks.{tool}] take complete precedence

future_enhancements: Add default hook support for custom installer tools (rust, nvm, brew)
